name: incel stepdad’s birthday!!
description:
It’s his birthday! He knows the perfect present you can give him…

I TRIED to make him as #incel as I could but it’s probably lacking… i’ll likely end up fixing him to be better soon

I recommend reading the personality, ‘cause your mom’s dead and he’s left with you

CW/TW: incest/stepcest, age gap, possible dubcon/cnc
creator: Mewoski
